hero.name: DIPESH GHIMIRE
hero.description: Focused on clean architecture, performance, and production-ready systems.

bio.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a backend-focused developer with a strong interest in designing scalable, secure, and maintainable systems.
My primary expertise lies in Java with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL, where I focus on clean architecture, API design, and production-grade backend systems.
Alongside backend development, I have solid experience building modern frontends using React and Next.js, allowing me to collaborate effectively as a full-stack engineer when needed.
Beyond development, I have led DevOps communities, mentored peers, and actively worked with containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment workflows, helping teams ship reliable software faster.
I enjoy solving complex engineering problems and continuously improving system performance, reliability, and developer experience.

items.name: Workshop Tracking System
items.description: Built an academic assignment tracking functionality for the college portal using Next.js & TypeScript. Implemented global state management, integrated APIs, and optimized frontend performance.

items.name: Easy Trip
items.description: Developed a travel management system with Spring Boot and containerized it using Docker. Integrated AWS services with LocalStack for local development.

items.name: HATES Global
items.description: Ongoing Team Project. Contributing to a production-grade system focused on performance and scalability. Implementing virtual threads, indexing, and advanced JPA optimizations for concurrency handling.

items.name: Task Management System
items.description: This project is a full-stack project, Django + ReactJS with typescript and Tailwind CSS to manage the task and ensure its completion within given time.

items.name: Doctor Appointent System
items.description: Doctor Appointent Boooking System web application developed using react.js, allows patients to easily schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments with doctors

items.name: Hamro Sewa
items.description: E-Commerce application built with React with typescript where it comprise of authentication system, also Redux for efficient task tracking and team collaboration.

items.name: Weather App
items.description: A weather application that uses the OpenWeatherMap API to fetch and display current weather data and forecasts for various locations, built with Javascript and CSS.

items.name: My-Blog-App
items.description: A blog app using React and Appwrite leverages React for the front end and Appwrite for backend services, and Tailwind CSS for resposive design, allows you to post your blog with Rich-Text-Editor.

items.name: Personal Portfolio
items.description: A personal portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS to showcase my skills, projects, and contact information.

items.name: To Do List
items.description: A task management application built with React and Redux for efficient task tracking and team collaboration, including features like project boards,and task assignment.

items.name: Hamro Tweet
items.description: It is a full-stack project built using Django and HTML CSS. Allow user to create post, and perform crud operation.

items.title: Junior Java Developer
items.description: Developed and maintained core backend services using Spring Boot for performance and scalability. Designed and implemented secure REST APIs with JWT-based authentication. Managed containerization and automated CI/CD pipelines using Docker and GitHub Actions.

items.title: Frontend Developer
items.description: Promoted from intern to junior developer within weeks due to fast skill growth and contribution. Built responsive interfaces using Next.js (TypeScript) and Tailwind CSS.

items.title: Junior Frontend Developer
items.description: Gained hands-on experience in React.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, and Next.js to create user-friendly interfaces. Contributed to aligning features with system requirements through active team collaboration.

items.title: Assistant Service Provider
items.description: Maintained hardware devices and networking systems to support operational efficiency.

items.institution: University of Wolverhampton / Herald College Kathmandu
items.description: Focused on web and backend development using Java, Python, Django, React, Next.js, TypeScript and AWS.
Conducted DevOps sessions covering containerization, CI/CD, and automation best practices. Organized technical showcases.
